description: ElderMara NPC voice lines (TTS-12, TTS-13) + storm/campfire SFX references + UE5 trigger volumes placed at hub clearing

tts_lines.text: Rain is coming. I can smell it — the soil, the wet bark, the change in the air. When the storm breaks, the big predators go still. They do not like lightning. Use that. Move when the thunder rolls. Rest when it clears. The storm is not your enemy — it is cover.
tts_lines.gameplay_context: Storm weather event — player approaches river/open zone

tts_lines.text: Fire is the only thing they respect. Not the flame itself — the light. Predators that hunt at night will circle your camp, but they will not cross into the firelight. Keep it burning. Feed it before you sleep. A dead fire in the night is an open door.
tts_lines.gameplay_context: Player builds or approaches first campfire at hub camp

sfx_references.name: thunder with steady rain
sfx_references.use_case: Storm ambient loop — open areas, river zones, weather system

sfx_references.name: Thunder Storm Nonstop Thunder
sfx_references.use_case: Intense storm event — weather system escalation, danger signal

sfx_references.name: Campfire 02
sfx_references.use_case: Campfire ambient loop — hub camp, player-built camps

sfx_references.name: FIREBurn_Campfire Forest Birds 01
sfx_references.use_case: Campfire + forest birds — dawn/dusk camp atmosphere layer

ue5_actors_placed.label: NPC_Hub_ElderMara_001
ue5_actors_placed.note: ElderMara elder NPC position at hub clearing. Replace with MetaHuman when available.

ue5_actors_placed.label: AudioTrigger_Storm_River_001
ue5_actors_placed.note: Triggers storm ambient audio + ElderMara StormSurvival dialogue

ue5_actors_placed.label: AudioTrigger_Campfire_Hub_001
ue5_actors_placed.note: Triggers campfire ambient audio + ElderMara FireCamp dialogue

ue5_actors_placed.label: Prop_Hub_Campfire_001
ue5_actors_placed.note: Campfire visual prop at hub camp. Replace with fire particle system when VFX agent delivers.

next_agent_handoff.priority: Replace Prop_Hub_Campfire_001 (sphere placeholder) with Niagara fire particle system. Add footstep dust particles at NPC_Hub_ElderMara_001 position. Storm weather VFX (rain particles, lightning flash) to match AudioTrigger_Storm_River_001 zone.
